---
title: "EPPS 6354 Information Management | Spring 2026"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Welcome to my coursework page for EPPS 6354:

## Coursework:

-   [Blog](blog.qmd)
-   [Assignments](6354assignments.qmd)

## Class Project:

### Pitch Deck

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Pitch Deck</strong></summary>

::: {style="margin: 1em 0;"}
<a href="6354PitchDeck.pptx" download      style="padding: 10px 16px; background-color: #2c3e50; color: white;              text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: bold;"> ⬇ Download Pitch Deck </a>
:::

<iframe src="6354PitchDeck.pdf#toolbar=1" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;" allow="fullscreen" allowfullscreen>

</iframe>

</details>
